analysis_scope: UI interaction patterns, state management, character validation, hierarchy rendering

expandable_content.description: Content expansion and truncation patterns for posts

progressive_disclosure.description: Multi-level content expansion for different content lengths
progressive_disclosure.implementation: Implement 3-tier expansion: preview (280 chars) -> summary (600 chars) -> full content

smart_truncation.description: Intelligent truncation at sentence or paragraph boundaries
smart_truncation.implementation: Use NLP-aware truncation instead of character count

content_preview.description: Rich content preview with media and link detection
content_preview.implementation: Extract and display media/links before truncation

expansion_prediction.description: Predict user likelihood to expand content
expansion_prediction.training_data: User interaction patterns, content type, length, engagement metrics

optimal_truncation.description: Learn optimal truncation points for different content types
optimal_truncation.training_data: User engagement after expansion, reading completion rates

character_validation.description: Character limits and validation patterns across post components

dynamic_limits.description: Adjust character limits based on content type and user behavior
dynamic_limits.implementation: Use ML to determine optimal limits per user/content type

smart_validation.description: Context-aware validation beyond simple character counting
smart_validation.implementation: Consider readability, completeness, and engagement potential

progressive_feedback.description: Multi-stage feedback system for content creation

optimal_length_prediction.description: Predict optimal content length for maximum engagement
optimal_length_prediction.training_data: Post performance metrics vs content length

quality_assessment.description: Assess content quality beyond character count
quality_assessment.training_data: User engagement, completion rates, sharing behavior

state_management.description: State management patterns for post interactions

centralized_post_state.description: Unified state management for post-related operations
centralized_post_state.implementation: Custom hook or context for post state management

optimistic_updates.description: Immediate UI updates with server reconciliation
optimistic_updates.implementation: Update UI immediately, rollback on server error

state_persistence.description: Smart persistence of user interaction state
state_persistence.implementation: Save scroll position, expansion state, interaction history

interaction_prediction.description: Predict user interactions to preload/optimize state

state_optimization.description: Optimize state updates based on user behavior
state_optimization.training_data: Performance metrics, user satisfaction, interaction patterns

adaptive_hierarchy.description: Dynamic content hierarchy based on importance
adaptive_hierarchy.implementation: ML-driven content prioritization and visual emphasis

contextual_rendering.description: Context-aware rendering based on user intent
contextual_rendering.implementation: Different layouts for reading vs browsing vs searching

semantic_structure.description: Semantic HTML structure for accessibility and SEO
semantic_structure.implementation: Proper heading hierarchy, ARIA labels, semantic markup

layout_optimization.description: Learn optimal layouts for different content types
layout_optimization.training_data: User engagement, reading patterns, task completion

visual_hierarchy_prediction.description: Predict optimal visual emphasis for content elements
visual_hierarchy_prediction.training_data: Eye tracking, engagement metrics, conversion rates

react_hooks_optimization.pattern: Efficient hook usage for post components

examples.optimization: Use useReducer for complex state, combine related state
Memoize event handlers to prevent unnecessary re-renders

character_limit_patterns.enhancement_strategy: Dynamic limits based on content analysis

common_failures.prevention: Use atomic state updates and conflict resolution
Persistent state management with unique keys

immediate_improvements: Implement smart truncation at sentence boundaries
Add progressive disclosure with multiple expansion levels
Enhance character validation with paste handling
Add state persistence for expansion preferences
medium_term_enhancements: Develop adaptive UI based on user behavior
